reviews.comment:
Parada obligada por la escasez de estaciones de servicio que hay en esa ruta, por lo tanto se hacen filas interminables y se pierde muchísimo tiempo en la espera de atención. Tienen que tener más personal, una persona por surtidor

(Translated by Google)
This is a mandatory stop due to the scarcity of gas stations on this route, resulting in endless lines and a huge amount of time wasted waiting for service. They need to hire more staff, one person per pump.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcWJMdnhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Impecable la estación de servicio. Pero no puede haber solamente un playero para todos los autos que habían. Los otros playeros estaban adentro de la oficina mirando...

(Translated by Google)
The gas station was spotless. But there couldn't be just one attendant for all the cars there. The other attendants were inside the office, watching...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCaWRhUnRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
🔥Buena atención, calidad del café 🍶maso😒😣una sugerencia✨ coloquen otra persona🚶 en el bar debido a que 2 es poco, todas las mesas estaban sucias incluso habían volteado cafe ☕en el piso y no había quién limpie debido a que los 2 sres estaban muy ocupados🏃

(Translated by Google)
🔥Good service, quality of coffee 🍶maso😒😣a suggestion✨ put another person🚶 at the bar because 2 is not enough, all the tables were dirty they had even spilled coffee ☕on the floor and there was no one to clean because the 2 gentlemen were very busy🏃
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMGVXWlNREAE

reviews.comment:
Deberían contratar mas personal de playas, son interminables las colas para cargar combustible y solo hay dos personas para eso, a mejorar esto

(Translated by Google)
They should hire more beach staff. The lines to fill up with fuel are endless, and there are only two people to do it. Let's improve this.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCanMzOXh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy paramos a cargar combustible. Lo mismo que los otros comentarios. Solo 2 para cargar con una cola larguísima. Cuando quise pagar con la aplicación me dijeron que no andaba. Cuando les pedí la factura dijeron que tenia hackeado el sistema y no podían hacerlo.
Ypf - ACA una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
Today we stopped to fill up. Same as the other reviews. Only two pumps available with a very long line. When I tried to pay with the app, they told me it wasn't working. When I asked for a receipt, they said their system had been hacked and they couldn't provide one. YPF - ACA is a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNXJlVUdnEAE

reviews.comment:
El servi club ,se abusa con los precios, mala presentación. Es más caro que un aeropuerto internacional

(Translated by Google)
The service club is overpriced and poorly presented. It's more expensive than an international airport.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Well, the service was a little slow because there were too many people.

reviews.comment:
Lugar de paso donde encontrás de todo comida, gaseosas, golosinas, agua caliente y demás para el viaje de paso y también combustible

(Translated by Google)
A place to stop where you can find everything: food, soft drinks, sweets, hot water and other necessities for your trip, and also fuel.
